---
title: Build Calimero Apps
description: Write a Calimero application — a sandboxed WASM module that is a shared, replicated state machine.
sidebar:
  label: Overview
  order: 1
---

import { CardGrid, LinkCard, Steps, Aside } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

A Calimero **application** is a sandboxed WASM module that defines a shared,
replicated state machine — its data types and the methods that mutate them. You
write it in Rust against the SDK; the node handles replication, conflict-free
merging, and sync.

## Start here

<Steps>

1. **[Quickstart](/build/quickstart/)** — install a node, install an app, call a method (15 min).
2. **[Build your first app](/build/tutorial/)** — scaffold → state → methods → build → run, end to end.
3. **Pick a [how-to guide](/build/guides/)** for the task in front of you.
4. Keep the **Reference** open as you go.

</Steps>
